headline: Netflix buys Ben Affleck's AI company, RFK Jr. targets Dunkin'
summary: Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma sits down with Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre to take a closer look at some of the top stories on Wall Street today. Netflix (NFLX) has acquired Ben Affleck's artificial intelligence (AI) film company InterPositive. US Department of Health and Human Services Secretary RFK Jr. has called on Dunkin' to prove that its ingredients are safe. Fast-casual restaurants, like Cava (CAVA), Chipotle (CMG), and Sweetgreen (SG), are struggling to maintain consumer interest. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination.

headline: Netflix Refocuses On Organic Growth With Warner Exit And AI Push
summary: Netflix (NasdaqGS:NFLX) ended its pursuit of acquiring Warner Bros. Discovery and instead received a substantial termination fee. The company reiterated its focus on organic growth, disciplined capital allocation, and technology driven content production. Netflix acquired InterPositive, an AI focused filmmaking company led by Ben Affleck, to expand its production toolkit. Netflix, best known for its global streaming service and growing content production arm, is recalibrating around what it...
